parameters.content:
Showrunner nightly recap (Track-2)

Reads 24h of memory_events under a token budget, qwen-plus writes a recap 'episode', stored to showrunner.private (memory_facts). Doubles as blog-post material. Skips silently on a truly empty day.
Needs: Brain Postgres cred + DASHSCOPE_* + QWEN_CHAT_MODEL.

parameters.query: SELECT agent_id, event_type, title, event_text, event_time FROM memory_events WHERE event_time > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' ORDER BY event_time ASC LIMIT 200;

INSERT INTO memory_facts (agent_id, memory_namespace, fact_type, subject, predicate, object_text, confidence, status) VALUES ('showrunner', 'showrunner.private', 'episode', '{{ $json.episode_title }}', 'recap', '{{ $json.recap_md }}', 0.900, 'approved');
